---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve Carnine
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happens.

## Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or log output to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Raspberry Pi OS, Ubuntu 24.04]
- Carnine Version: [e.g. 1.2.0]
- Component: [e.g. Backend, Frontend, Both]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.
